code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD harmony_of_blows[Harmony of Blows] click harmony_of_blows callback " Harmony of Blows

Cost: 8 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Extra Action
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The patterns and flows of a battlefield hold no mysteries for the character. She does not need to improvise last-second defenses. She notices openings well before they appear. She can choose her blows precisely, selecting multiple actions that combine harmoniously. In the turn in which she invokes this Charm, the character can take two extra attack actions, using Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm.
This Charm is explicitly permitted to be in a Combo with Charms of other Abilities. Note that the rules on Combos may limit the kinds of actions a character can take. " meditation_on_war[Meditation on War] harmony_of_blows --> meditation_on_war click meditation_on_war callback " Meditation on War

Cost: 1 mote per die + 1 mote per dice pool penalty cancelled
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Calm and precision envelops the character as she strikes. She adds dice to one Melee attack, increasing it to a maximum of its normal pool plus the character's Essence. For example, an Essence 3 character who has a - 1 wound penalty can spend up to 4 motes to enhance her attack. This can overcome penalties that reduce the character's dice pool to 0 before Charms. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm. " orchestration_of_conflict[Orchestration of Conflict] harmony_of_blows --> orchestration_of_conflict click orchestration_of_conflict callback " Orchestration of Conflict

Cost: 2 motes per target number reduction
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Manipulating the local flow of a conflict through the ripple effects of her own actions, the character reduces the target number for a Melee attack or parry. " impeding_the_flow[Impeding the Flow] click impeding_the_flow callback " Impeding the Flow

Cost: 3 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

A wind full of red stardust and the character's will, visible to those who can see dematerialized spirits, spins around the character. It reroutes the flows of Essence and fate that normally allow others to attack her. A casual movement of the Exalt's weapon parries any one incoming attack she is aware of, so long as the attack has a physical component and is not specifically noted as impossible to block. This is not a perfect defense. " serenity_in_blood[Serenity in Blood] harmony_of_blows --> serenity_in_blood impeding_the_flow --> serenity_in_blood click serenity_in_blood callback " Serenity in Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows, Impeding the Flow

Stirring the currents of fate with the tip of her weapon, the character disrupts the path of any attack made against her, so long as it passes through any portion of the world bound by fate. If she is unaware of the attack, her player must make a reflexive Perception + Melee roll at difficulty 3 to divert the blow. Otherwise, this is a perfect block, capable of stopping even unblockable attacks. " smiling_at_the_damned[Smiling at the Damned] click smiling_at_the_damned callback " Smiling at the Damned

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: None

In the moment the character's weapon strikes true, the colors around her take on a harsh red tinge. Essence dissolves at the weapon's touch. Halve the raw damage for one attack, rounding down, but the damage is aggravated. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Conviction with this Charm. " perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior[Perfection of the Visionary Warrior] meditation_on_war --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior orchestration_of_conflict --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior serenity_in_blood --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior smiling_at_the_damned --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior click perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior callback " Perfection of the Visionary Warrior

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Melee: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Meditation on War, Orchestration of Conflict, Serenity in Blood, Smiling at the Damned

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Maiden on the Shelf. The character places it across his eyes, whereupon it adheres and begins to drip with dark blood. The character suffers no visibility penalties. All opponents and attacks become apparent to him, although effects such as the Mental Invisibility Technique can force him to ignore them. He sees enemies not as bodies and faces but as patterns of fate and potential or — for creatures outside of fate — disruptions in such patterns. The character can reflexively parry any blockable attack with his full Dexterity + Melee dice pool. Once per turn, after his initiative, he can reflexively make an Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown attack at his full dice pool. He cannot use the latter ability in any turn where he splits his normal dice pool. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Sidereal的Melee Charms绘制一个完整的技能树。核心起点应该是Harmony of Blows，这是一个Extra Action类型的Charm，能让角色在一回合内进行两次额外攻击。
明白了，Harmony of Blows作为根节点。我注意到它的先决条件是None，那它应该是独立存在的起始点。需要我把它的完整属性——8 motes消耗、Instant持续时间、Melee 2和Essence 2的最低要求——都标注在节点里吗？
对，全部标注。另外特别注明它允许与不同Ability的Charms组成Combo，这是关键特性。现在从Harmony of Blows应该分出三条分支：Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict和Serenity in Blood。
好的，三条连线已添加。Meditation on War是Supplemental类型，通过消耗mote来增加攻击骰数，最多到正常池加上Essence值。Orchestration of Conflict也是Supplemental，但作用是降低目标数值。这两个都是Melee 3、Essence 2的要求。
等等，Serenity in Blood的情况比较特殊。它虽然从Harmony of Blows延伸出来，但它还有一个前置条件——Impeding the Flow。这是一个双先决条件的Charm。
所以Serenity in Blood需要同时满足Harmony of Blows和Impeding the Flow？那Impeding the Flow本身的位置在哪里？它也是根节点吗？
没错，Impeding the Flow是独立的根节点，Prerequisite Charms为None。它是Reflexive类型，能偏转一次有物理成分的攻击，但不是完美防御。Melee 2、Essence 1的门槛相对较低。
已添加Impeding the Flow作为第二个根节点，并建立它到Serenity in Blood的连接。Serenity in Blood现在是Reflexive类型的完美格挡，可以阻止甚至无法格挡的攻击，消耗5 motes和1 Willpower。
还需要加入Smiling at the Damned，这是另一个独立的根节点。它让攻击伤害变为恶性伤害，虽然总伤害减半。Melee 4、Essence 3的要求比较高。
Smiling at the Damned已添加，Supplemental类型，5 motes消耗。现在我们有四个前置Charm都指向同一个终点——Perfection of the Visionary Warrior，对吗？
准确说是四个前置：Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict、Serenity in Blood和Smiling at the Damned。这四个都必须习得才能学习Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。这是这个技能树的终极Charm。
四条连线已建立。Perfection of the Visionary Warrior是Simple类型，持续一整场景，消耗相当高——10 motes、1 Willpower还要支付1 health level。Melee 5、Essence 3的要求也是最高的。
这个Charm的效果非常关键：角色不再受 visibility penalties 影响，能看到敌人和攻击的本质——不是肉体和面孔，而是命运与潜能的patterns。虽然Mental Invisibility Technique可以强制让他忽略，但本质上他获得了完整的战场感知。
我注意到描述中提到他可以反射性地用完整的Dexterity + Melee骰池格挡任何可格挡攻击，而且每回合还能在 initiative 之后进行一次完整的Archery、Brawl、Melee或Thrown攻击。需要把这些战斗细节也标注进去吗？
对，全部保留。特别注明他不能把后者与分割骰池的动作在同一回合使用。另外，对于非命运生物，他看到的是patterns中的disruptions——这种对比很重要。
检查一下结构：两个独立根节点Harmony of Blows和Impeding the Flow，加上Smiling at the Damned。Harmony of Blows分出三条线，其中Serenity in Blood还额外需要Impeding the Flow。最终四个前置汇聚到Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。结构正确吗？
完全正确。所有节点的callback信息都包含完整的规则文本，包括Sidereal使用Temperance或Conviction的特权。这个技能树展示了Sidereal如何通过理解命运的流动来主宰战场。
